message:
fix(tests): align test fixtures with current type definitions

Multiple test files had outdated mock data structures that didn't match
the current TypeScript interfaces. This caused CI TypeScript checks to
fail even though runtime tests passed.

## Changes

### OperatorsClient.test.tsx
- Added missing `quotes`, `promptModule`, and `quoteBankAnchors` properties
  to mock operators to match `OperatorWithQuotes` type definition
- Extracted mock quotes to reusable constants

### collapsible.test.tsx
- Added missing `afterEach` import from vitest
- The test was using `afterEach` without importing it

### command-palette.test.tsx
- Added missing router mock methods (`back`, `forward`, `refresh`,
  `replace`, `prefetch`) to satisfy `AppRouterInstance` type

### storage.test.ts
- Updated mock hypothesis card structure:
  - Changed `hypothesisId` to `id` (correct field name)
  - Changed `domains` to `domain` (correct field name)
  - Added missing required fields: `mechanism`, `sessionId`, `status`,
    `specificity`, `falsifiability`, `operators`, `predictions`,
    `evidence`, `objections`, `tags`
  - Changed `assumptionIds` to `assumptions`
  - Fixed Date types for `createdAt`/`updatedAt`

### undoManager.test.ts
- Changed `statement` from object `{ claim, domain, context }` to
  plain string to match `HypothesisCard.statement: string` type

### hypothesis-lifecycle.test.ts
- Added `as const` assertions to state literal values in invalid data
  test to satisfy union type requirements

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
